rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use named constants or visible relations for bounds.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports are exposed.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
